title: juno graeberiana
side_effects: Juno graeberiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can also lead to stomach problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. In some cases, excessive consumption of Juno graeberiana can cause liver damage, as well as interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications. Additionally, using the plant's extract without proper guidance can lead to an imbalance of essential nutrients in the body, causing fatigue, weakness, and other health complications.
